response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptional software engineer with 19 years of diverse development experience and strong foundation in developer tools and infrastructure. However, this is explicitly a full-time people-leadership role requiring 2 years of formal people management experience, which is entirely absent from the resume. While his teaching and mentoring activities demonstrate communication skills, they do not substitute for the ability to manage performance, conduct one-on-ones, develop talent, and lead organizational change. This represents too significant a gap for a mid-to-senior manager position.
strengths: Exceptional technical expertise with 19 years across web, mobile, embedded systems, and developer tools/infrastructure (GitLab, CI/CD, Docker, artifact repositories)
Proven ability to communicate complex concepts and develop others through multiple conference talks, workshops, and code kata organization
Direct experience with the role's focus area: developer tools (GISCollective platform, MCP frameworks, build/testing infrastructure at Altom and re:cinq)
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience despite role requiring 2 years—zero evidence of managing direct reports, performance feedback, hiring, or team development responsibilities
Frequent job changes averaging ~1.5 years per role with overlapping concurrent positions suggest difficulty committing long-term to senior roles
No evidence of leading organizational change or scaling/building engineering teams, both core Level II manager responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Strong developer tools and infrastructure expertise
